name: FeatureGrid

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Centered heading above the grid. Also names the <section> landmark via aria-labelledby. Omitted when null/empty.

parameters.name: Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns at the widest breakpoint: 1, 2, 3 (default) or 4. Any other value falls back to the 3-column layout.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The feature callouts, typically FeatureItem instances.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root section.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root section.

examples.title: Basic Feature Grid
examples.code:
<FeatureGrid Title="Everything in the box"
             Subtitle="A focused set of primitives that compose into anything.">
    <FeatureItem Title="Theming" Description="Every color is a CSS variable.">
        <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Palette)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
    </FeatureItem>
    <FeatureItem Title="Accessible" Description="WAI-ARIA roles and keyboard navigation.">
        <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Accessibility)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
    </FeatureItem>
    <FeatureItem Title="Density" Description="Flip a panel between compact and spacious.">
        <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Rows3)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
    </FeatureItem>
</FeatureGrid>

examples.title: Two Columns
examples.code:
<FeatureGrid Columns="2" Title="Built for Blazor">
    <FeatureItem Title="Native components" Description="Pure Razor with thin interop where it counts." />
    <FeatureItem Title="Source generators" Description="The [LumeoForm] generator wires up validation and binding." />
</FeatureGrid>

examples.title: Standalone Feature Item
examples.code:
<FeatureItem Title="Fast by default" Description="A small CSS bundle keeps your app lean.">
    <IconContent><SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Zap)" class="h-5 w-5" /></IconContent>
</FeatureItem>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The feature callouts, typically FeatureItem instances.

mdSummary:
# FeatureGrid

Feature Grid component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Marketing
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/feature-grid

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FeatureGrid | Title | `string?` | `` | Centered heading above the grid. Also names the \<section\> landmark via aria-labelledby. Omitted when null/empty. |
| FeatureGrid | Subtitle | `string?` | `` | Centered supporting text below Title. |
| FeatureGrid | Columns | `int` | `3` | Number of columns at the widest breakpoint: 1, 2, 3 (default) or 4. Any other value falls back to the 3-column layout. |
| FeatureGrid | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The feature callouts, typically FeatureItem instances. |
| FeatureGrid | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root section. |
| FeatureGrid | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root section. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (FeatureGrid) — The feature callouts, typically FeatureItem instances.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<FeatureGrid />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/FeatureGrid/FeatureGrid.razor`
